name: Block Closing Non-Owned Accounts
description: Prevent transactions that close token accounts you don't own

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Attempting to close a token account you don't own

name: Block Transfers from Non-Owned Accounts
description: Prevent transferring tokens from accounts you don't control (without proper delegation)

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Attempting to transfer tokens from an account you don't own

name: Block Authority Changes on Non-Owned Accounts
description: Prevent modifying authority on accounts you don't control

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Attempting to modify authority on an account you don't own

name: Alert on Approving Non-Owned Tokens
description: Warn when delegating tokens you don't own (may be legitimate with existing delegation)

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Delegating tokens from an account you don't directly own

name: Block Multiple Non-Owned Operations
description: Block if transaction has 2+ operations on non-owned accounts (very suspicious)

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Multiple operations on accounts you don't own (highly suspicious)
